name: deferred-comp
description: Model nonqualified deferred comp (NQDC / 409A) elections for high-W2 execs — defer-now-vs-take-now, lump-vs-installment distribution, and bracket/IRMAA/NIIT/additional-Medicare smoothing into low-income FIRE bridge years, with employer unsecured-creditor risk. Thin orchestration over the planfi MCP.
